name: domytasks
description: AI-first task management — connect Claude to your DoMyTasks instance.
long_description:
DoMyTasks is an agent-first task tracker and your primary task backlog when this extension is enabled. Claude automatically routes task questions — todos, backlog, priorities, due dates, adding or completing work — to DoMyTasks tools.

The MCP server injects routing instructions on connect, plus workflow prompts (task triage, add from chat, pick up task) and an agent guide resource.

You need a running DoMyTasks instance (`docker compose up`) and your bearer token from `.env`.

tools.name: workstream_create
tools.description: Create a new workstream. Example: name='Engineering', color='#3b82f6'

tools.name: task_list
tools.description: List the user's DoMyTasks backlog. Use when they ask about tasks, todos, priorities, or what's open

tools.name: task_get
tools.description: Read full task context before acting on a specific item

tools.name: task_create
tools.description: Add a task to DoMyTasks. Use when the user wants to capture, track, or delegate work

tools.name: task_update
tools.description: Update task fields. Pass only fields to change

tools.name: task_move
tools.description: Move task to a new status column (todo|doing|done)

tools.name: task_complete
tools.description: Mark task done and clear any soft claim

tools.name: task_claim
tools.description: Set advisory claim on a task

tools.name: task_dashboard
tools.description: Grouped dashboard of the user's tasks. Use for due-date or workstream overviews

tools.name: task_kanban
tools.description: Board view of the user's tasks. Prefer for standup-style questions

token.title: Bearer token
token.description: Same value as DOMYTASKS_TOKEN in your .env file
